watchlist.name: linux
watchlist.description: The Linux kernel is an open-source operating system kernel that serves as the foundation for Linux-based operating systems. It powers the majority of servers, supercomputers, embedded devices, Android smartphones, and cloud infrastructure worldwide. As a monolithic Unix-like kernel, it provides process management, memory management, file systems, device drivers, and networking capabilities.
